_record: runs/<space>/funnels/<funnel_id>.json — funnel-level fields (6a, recorded ONCE per funnel)
_produced_by: s2-section-analyzer (agent, PROVISIONAL — primary_claim..urgency_construction); routing_flag by s2-router; validation_* by funnel-score.js; persisted by funnel-store.js
_note: funnel-store.js persists funnel_fields PREFERRED over funnelPkg.* (fixed bbff2ff). source_type/transformation/niche come from the PMF stage — do not re-derive.

shape.transformation: string — the ONE transformation this funnel sells; from PMF stage
shape.routing_flag: enum:ROUTING_FLAG — set by Router at plan time, NEVER inferred by Analyzer
shape.primary_claim: string — verbatim headline claim; set by Analyzer
shape.claim_type: enum:CLAIM_TYPE — funnel top-line claim type; set by Analyzer
shape.awareness_entry: enum:AWARENESS_ENTRY — read off problem-education load; set by Analyzer
funnel_sequence: string — ordered pages/sections and what each does; set by Analyzer
shape.offer_mechanic: string — the commitment hook; set by Analyzer
shape.urgency_construction: string — mechanic AND number; set by Analyzer
validation_lane: A | B | unknown — set by funnel-score.js
